name: Easy Soft Pretzels
recipeInstructions:
1. Unroll the pizza dough onto a lightly floured wax paper surface.
2. Roll the dough into a rectangle measuring 16 by 10 inches.
3. Cut the dough into ten 1-inch-wide strips.
4. Shape each strip of dough into a circle, overlapping about 4 inches from each end and leaving ends free.
5. Take one end of the dough in each hand and twist at the point where the dough overlaps.
6. Carefully lift each end across to the edge of the circle opposite it.
7. Tuck the ends under to seal the pretzel shape.
8. Place the pretzels 1 inch apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
9. Beat together the egg and water until combined.
10. Brush each pretzel with the egg mixture.
11. Sprinkle sesame seeds, poppy seeds, coarse salt, garlic salt, or onion salt over the pretzels.
12. Bake in a 350 degree Fahrenheit oven for 15 to 17 minutes, or until golden brown.
13. Serve warm.
